items.title: The True Crime Story of a Notorious Looter
items.summary: How Douglas Latchford got away with it; plus, Frank Stella’s Navajo weavings.

items.title: The Looter Who Built Your Favorite Museum
items.summary: A new book maps the network that allowed Douglas Latchford to violently rip Khmer statues from their homes and funnel them into Western institutions.

items.title: Art Movements: Wolfgang Tillmans Wins Europe's Richest Art Prize
items.summary: The first public exhibition of Jack White's artwork, Cheryl Finley gets the David C. Driskell Prize, and more news to know.

items.title: Required Reading
items.summary: This week: a record-breaking World Cup mural in Mexico City, the Gen Z of 19th-century France, van Gogh and AI, and more.
